description: DB-backed kit summary/detail test covers no-BOM, ready, low-stock, fixed-price, sum-price, and non-stocked component cases.
Action test proves create-kit creates a catalog product and inventory settings with is_kit=true.
Action test proves update-kit persists identity, pricing mode, and fixed price validation.
BOM mutation test covers add, duplicate update quantity, positive-integer validation, and remove.
Sales-order regression proves kit explosion still creates one priced parent line and zero-dollar child component lines.
Browser smoke covers create kit, add BOM, see readiness/margin, sales-order preview, error/empty states, search, and status filter.

Pricing tests prove sum mode uses the exact BOM component selling-price sum with no catalog-rate fallback, fixed mode uses the configured amount, and incomplete or mixed-currency costs suppress margin.

DB-backed sales-order test proves a kit parent defaults to the canonical resolved price, re-resolves after a component price change, rejects a silent currency mismatch, and preserves an explicit one-order override.

Component/UI test proves sum mode has no editable kit-price field, fixed mode has exactly one, Create kit requests price only for fixed mode, and a changed sales-order kit price shows override and reset controls.
